languages.text: "Нет. Мы оставили наши разногласия в прошлом. Мои мысли стали гораздо структурированнее с установкой нейроимпланта, и теперь я не вижу необходимости в конфликте".
"That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."
languages.original_text: "Нет. Мы оставили наши разногласия в прошлом. Мои мысли стали гораздо структурированнее с установкой нейроимпланта, и теперь я не вижу необходимости в конфликте".

traits.locale_text: "That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."
"That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."
"That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."

languages.text: 「それはもう過去のことです。私たちは違いを乗り越えました。神経インプラントの装着により、私の考え方はとても整理されたものになりました。今は争いの必要性を感じません」
languages.original_text: "That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."

traits.locale_text: 「それはもう過去のことです。私たちは違いを乗り越えました。神経インプラントの装着により、私の考え方はとても整理されたものになりました。今は争いの必要性を感じません。」

languages.text: "O geçmişte kaldı. Farklılıklarımızı geride bıraktık. Nöral implantın takılmasıyla düşüncelerim çok daha düzenli hâle geldi, artık çatışmaya gerek görmüyorum."
languages.original_text: "That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."

traits.locale_text: "O geçmişte kaldı. Farklılıklarımızı geride bıraktık. Nöral implantın takılmasıyla düşüncelerim çok daha düzenli hâle geldi, artık çatışmaya gerek görmüyorum."

languages.text: «Eso ya está en el pasado. Hemos dejado atrás nuestras diferencias. El implante neuronal me ha ayudado a estructurar mejor mis pensamientos, y ahora no veo la necesidad de entrar en conflicto».
languages.original_text: "That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."

traits.locale_text: «Eso ya está en el pasado. Hemos dejado atrás nuestras diferencias. El implante neuronal me ha ayudado a estructurar mejor mis pensamientos, y ahora no veo la necesidad de entrar en conflicto».

languages.text: “都已经过去了。我们不再执着于我们之间的分歧。装了神经植入物以后，我的思维更有条理了，现在我看不到冲突的必要。”
languages.original_text: "That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."

traits.locale_text: “都已经过去了。我们不再执着于我们之间的分歧。装了神经植入物以后，我的思维更有条理了，现在我看不到冲突的必要。”

languages.text: « C'est de l'histoire ancienne. Nous avons laissé nos différends derrière nous. Mes pensées sont bien plus structurées depuis que l'on m'a posé cet implant neuronal et à mes yeux, ce désaccord n'a plus lieu d'être. »
languages.original_text: "That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."

traits.locale_text: « C'est de l'histoire ancienne. Nous avons laissé nos différends derrière nous. Mes pensées sont bien plus structurées depuis que l'on m'a posé cet implant neuronal et à mes yeux, ce désaccord n'a plus lieu d'être. »

languages.text: "Das ist jetzt Vergangenheit. Wir haben unsere Differenzen hinter uns gelassen. Meine Gedanken sind seit der Installation des neuralen Implantats viel strukturierter geworden, und ich sehe keinen Anlass mehr für Konflikte."
languages.original_text: "That's in the past now. We've put our differences behind us. My thoughts have become much more structured with the installation of the neural implant, and now I don't see the need for conflict."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist jetzt Vergangenheit. Wir haben unsere Differenzen hinter uns gelassen. Meine Gedanken sind seit der Installation des neuralen Implantats viel strukturierter geworden, und ich sehe keinen Anlass mehr für Konflikte."
